## Verses (50)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | I will give you my love, O Lord, my strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | The Lord is my Rock, my walled town, and my saviour; my God, my Rock, in him will I put my faith; my breastplate, and the horn of my salvation, and my high tower. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | I will send up my cry to the Lord, who is to be praised; so will I be made safe from those who are against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The cords of death were round me, and the seas of evil put me in fear. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | The cords of hell were round me: the nets of death came on me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | In my trouble my voice went up to the Lord, and my cry to my God: my voice came to his hearing in his holy Temple, and my prayer came before him, even into his ears. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Then trouble and shock came on the earth; and the bases of the mountains were moved and shaking, because he was angry. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | There went up a smoke from his nose, and a fire of destruction from his mouth: flames were lighted by it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | The heavens were bent, so that he might come down; and it was dark under his feet. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | And he went in flight through the air, seated on a storm-cloud: going quickly on the wings of the wind. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | He made the dark his secret place; his tent round him was the dark waters and thick clouds of the skies. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Before his shining light his dark clouds went past, raining ice and fire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | The Lord made thunder in the heavens, and the voice of the Highest was sounding out: a rain of ice and fire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | He sent out his arrows, driving them in all directions; by his flames of fire they were troubled. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Then the deep beds of the waters were seen, and the bases of the world were uncovered, because of your words of wrath, O Lord, because of the breath from your mouth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | He sent from on high, he took me, pulling me out of great waters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | He made me free from my strong hater, and from those who were against me, because they were stronger than I. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | They came on me in the day of my trouble; but the Lord was my support. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | He took me out into a wide place; he was my saviour because he had delight in me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | The Lord gives me the reward of my righteousness, because my hands are clean before him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | For I have kept the ways of the Lord; I have not been turned away in sin from my God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | For all his decisions were before me, and I did not put away his laws from me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | And I was upright before him, and I kept myself from sin. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Because of this the Lord has given me the reward of my righteousness, because my hands are clean in his eyes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | On him who has mercy you will have mercy; to the upright you will be upright; | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | He who is holy will see that you are holy; but to the man whose way is not straight you will be a hard judge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | For you are the saviour of those who are in trouble; but eyes full of pride will be made low. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | You, O Lord, will be my light; by you, my God, the dark will be made bright for me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | By your help I have made a way through the wall which was shutting me in; by the help of my God I have gone over a wall. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | As for God, his way is completely good; the word of the Lord is tested; he is a breastplate for all those who put their faith in him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | For who is God but the Lord? or who is a Rock but our God? | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | God puts a strong band about me, guiding me in a straight way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | He makes my feet like roes' feet, and puts me on high places. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | He makes my hands expert in war, so that a bow of brass is bent by my arms. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | You have given me the breastplate of your salvation: your right hand has been my support, and your mercy has made me great. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | You have made my steps wide under me, so that my feet are kept from slipping. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | I go after my haters and overtake them; not turning back till they are all overcome. | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | I will give them wounds, so that they are not able to get up: they are stretched under my feet. | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | For I have been armed by you with strength for the fight: you have made low under me those who come out against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | By you their backs are turned in flight, so that my haters are cut off. | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
| [41](BBE.md#v41) | They were crying out, but there was no one to come to their help: even to the Lord, but he gave them no answer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v41) · [KJV](KJV.md#v41) · [ASV](ASV.md#v41) |
| [42](BBE.md#v42) | Then they were crushed as small as dust before the wind; they were drained out like the waste of the streets. | [WEB](WEB.md#v42) · [KJV](KJV.md#v42) · [ASV](ASV.md#v42) |
| [43](BBE.md#v43) | You have made me free from the fightings of the people; you have made me the head of the nations: a people of whom I had no knowledge will be my servants. | [WEB](WEB.md#v43) · [KJV](KJV.md#v43) · [ASV](ASV.md#v43) |
| [44](BBE.md#v44) | From the time when my name comes to their ears they will be ruled by me: men of other countries will, with false hearts, put themselves under my authority. | [WEB](WEB.md#v44) · [KJV](KJV.md#v44) · [ASV](ASV.md#v44) |
| [45](BBE.md#v45) | They will be wasting away, they will come out of their secret places shaking with fear. | [WEB](WEB.md#v45) · [KJV](KJV.md#v45) · [ASV](ASV.md#v45) |
| [46](BBE.md#v46) | The Lord is living; praise be to my Rock, and let the God of my salvation be honoured. | [WEB](WEB.md#v46) · [KJV](KJV.md#v46) · [ASV](ASV.md#v46) |
| [47](BBE.md#v47) | It is God who sends punishment on my haters, and puts peoples under my rule. | [WEB](WEB.md#v47) · [KJV](KJV.md#v47) · [ASV](ASV.md#v47) |
| [48](BBE.md#v48) | He makes me free from my haters; I am lifted up over those who come up against me: you have made me free from the violent man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v48) · [KJV](KJV.md#v48) · [ASV](ASV.md#v48) |
| [49](BBE.md#v49) | Because of this I will give you praise, O Lord, among the nations, and will make a song of praise to your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v49) · [KJV](KJV.md#v49) · [ASV](ASV.md#v49) |
| [50](BBE.md#v50) | Great salvation does he give to his king; he has mercy on the king of his selection, David, and on his seed for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v50) · [KJV](KJV.md#v50) · [ASV](ASV.md#v50) |
